faq.label: Support
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.intro: Practical answers about expeditions, ventures, the store, and how we work across Africa. For anything not covered here, reach out via our contact page.

items.question: How do I inquire about an expedition?
items.answer: Visit Expeditions to explore journeys, then use Expeditions Connect or the main Contact page. Share your dates, group size, and interests — our team shapes itineraries with local guides and partners.

items.question: Are Afari Trails ventures open to partners?
items.answer: Yes. Hospitality, conservation, community, agriculture, and eco-lodge initiatives welcome aligned partners. Start on Ventures or Ventures Connect with a short note about your vision and timeline.

items.question: Can I purchase from the store online?
items.answer: Add items to your cart, then submit an order request with your shipping details. Our team will confirm availability and send payment options (bank transfer, mobile money, or international payment) — suited for customers in Zambia and abroad. For wholesale, use Contact and select Store.

items.question: Where do you ship store orders?
items.answer: When ordering is available, we ship internationally from our fulfilment partners. See Shipping for regions, timelines, and customs notes.

items.question: What is your returns policy?
items.answer: Unworn items in original condition may be returned within 30 days of delivery where applicable. Full details are on our Returns page.

items.question: How can I submit photography to The Afari Lens?
items.answer: Go to Archive → Submit to share your work for consideration in our community feature. Include context, location, and how the image connects to place.

items.question: Do you offer media or press collaborations?
items.answer: We welcome storytelling that respects people and landscapes. Use Contact and choose Media, or write to hello@afaritrails.com with your pitch.

shipping.label: Support
shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.intro: We pack every order with care — mindful of distance, climate, and the communities that craft many of our pieces.

sections.heading: Processing
paragraphs: Orders are prepared within 3–5 business days after confirmation. Made-to-order or community marketplace items may require additional time; we will confirm before dispatch.

sections.heading: Domestic & regional
paragraphs: Within Zambia and select Southern and East African destinations, delivery typically takes 5–12 business days via trusted courier partners.

sections.heading: International
paragraphs: International shipments usually arrive within 10–21 business days depending on destination and customs processing. Tracking is provided when available.
Import duties and taxes are the responsibility of the recipient unless stated otherwise at checkout.

sections.heading: Care in transit
paragraphs: Apparel and field goods are packed in protective materials suited to long journeys. If your order arrives damaged, contact us within 7 days with photos — see Returns.

returns.label: Support
returns.title: Returns & Exchanges
returns.intro: We want you to keep what you love. If something is not right, we will work with you fairly and clearly.

sections.heading: Eligibility
paragraphs: Items may be returned within 30 days of delivery if unworn, unwashed, and in original packaging with tags attached. Community marketplace goods may have partner-specific terms noted on the product page.

sections.heading: How to start a return
paragraphs: Email hello@afaritrails.com with your order reference, reason for return, and photos if the item is faulty or damaged. We will reply with return instructions and a reference number.

sections.heading: Refunds
paragraphs: Approved refunds are issued to the original payment method within 7–14 business days after we receive and inspect the item. Shipping costs on standard returns are non-refundable unless the error was ours.

sections.heading: Exchanges
paragraphs: Exchanges for size or colour are offered when stock allows. Note your preference when you contact us — we will confirm availability before you ship anything back.

sections.heading: Damaged or incorrect items
paragraphs: If your order arrives damaged or incorrect, notify us within 7 days. We will arrange replacement or refund and cover return shipping for verified issues.
